name: Local LLM
description: A local language model blueprint focused on Ollama, LM Studio, and conservative model sizing.

apps.reason: Simple local LLM runtime for supported models.
Desktop interface for trying and comparing local models.
Useful for reviewing open-source model tooling manually.
Useful for local AI scripting and examples.

config_recommendations: Start with small quantized models before trying larger models.
Keep model storage on a disk with enough free space.
Avoid running multiple large local models at the same time.
risk_warnings: Large local models can consume substantial RAM, VRAM, and disk space.
StackPilot v0.1 does not download models automatically.
not_recommended: Large 30B+ models on systems with limited RAM or unknown VRAM.
next_steps: Install one local LLM tool manually.
Run StackPilot again after setup to check detected tools.
